name: Apollo Pipes Limited
summary: Apollo Pipes Limited engages in the manufacturing and trading of polyvinyl chloride (PVC) pipes and fittings under the APL Apollo brand name in India and internationally. The company offers cPVC, uPVC, HDPE, and UPVC pipes and fittings; sprinkler and drainage systems; bath fittings, including faucets, cisterns, showers, seat covers, and other accessories; and solvent cement. Its products are used in agriculture, water management, construction, infrastructure, and telecom ducting applications. The company was formerly known as Amulya Leasing and Finance Limited and changed its name to Apollo Pipes Limited in December 2017. Apollo Pipes Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
